description: Somna control panel widget configuration. Generated from Doc 51 Â§4 key inventory.

widgets.label: Master Volume
widgets.tooltip: Master binaural + carrier output level (0—100).

widgets.label: Noise Volume
widgets.tooltip: Colored noise output level (0—100). Color set via buttons.

widgets.label: Beat Frequency (Hz)
widgets.tooltip: Binaural beat frequency. Agent and timeline may override.

widgets.label: Carrier Freq (Hz)
widgets.tooltip: Binaural carrier tone. Left ear = carrier, right = carrier+beat.

widgets.label: Carrier Shape
widgets.tooltip:
Carrier waveform shape for isochronic and binaural tones.
Square has sharper onset/offset and is more perceptually salient.
Sine is smoothest. Triangle is a middle ground.

widgets.label: Entrainment Mode
widgets.tooltip: Audio entrainment delivery method.

widgets.label: Binaural Blend
widgets.tooltip: Mix between pure binaural (0) and AM-modulated isochronic (1).

widgets.label: Breath Modulation
widgets.tooltip: Amplitude-modulate carrier at breath rate for pacing.

widgets.label: Breath Rate (BPM)
widgets.tooltip: Target breaths per minute for modulation pacing.

widgets.label: AM Depth
widgets.tooltip: Amplitude modulation depth for isochronic / breath pacing.

widgets.label: FM Depth (Hz)
widgets.tooltip:
Carrier frequency deviation for FM entrainment.
Narrow (~2 Hz) = subtle warble. Wide (~20 Hz) = dramatic vibrato.
Only active when Entrainment Mode is set to FM.

widgets.label: Bilateral Panning
widgets.tooltip:
Alternating L/R audio panning (EMDR-style).
Engages interhemispheric communication.
Orthogonal to beat type — stacks with any mode.

widgets.label: Bilateral Rate (Hz)
widgets.tooltip:
Panning alternation rate.
Match beat frequency for spatial entrainment.
Use 0.5–2.0 Hz for EMDR-rate during reconsolidation.

widgets.label: Bilateral Mode
widgets.tooltip:
Smooth = sinusoidal pan (gradual).
Hard = square wave (percussive, stronger lateralization).

widgets.label: Bilateral Depth
widgets.tooltip:
Panning depth.
0.0 = centered (no pan), 1.0 = full L/R alternation.

widgets.label: Trance Score
widgets.tooltip: Composite trance depth estimate from EEG alpha/theta ratio, HRV, and stillness.

widgets.label: Session Time
widgets.tooltip: Total elapsed session time in HH:MM:SS.

widgets.label: Sleep Stage
widgets.tooltip: Current sleep stage classification from EEG spectral analysis.

widgets.label: Stage Confidence
widgets.tooltip: Classifier confidence in current sleep stage label.

widgets.label: Sleep Phase
widgets.tooltip: Current sleep conductor phase.

widgets.label: SWE Frequency (Hz)
widgets.tooltip: Slow-wave entrainment target frequency.

widgets.label: SWE Amplitude
widgets.tooltip: Slow-wave entrainment modulation depth.

widgets.label: Deep Sleep Time
widgets.tooltip: Cumulative time in N2+N3 stages (MM:SS).

widgets.label: Sleep Cycles
widgets.tooltip: Number of completed NREM-REM sleep cycles.

widgets.label: TMR Enabled
widgets.tooltip: Enable targeted memory reactivation during N2/N3.

widgets.label: TMR Active
widgets.tooltip: Whether TMR cue delivery is currently active.

widgets.label: TMR Cue Volume
widgets.tooltip: Volume ceiling for TMR cue playback during sleep.

widgets.label: TMR Target Pool
widgets.tooltip: Currently selected conditioning pool for TMR cueing.

widgets.label: Phase Locked
widgets.tooltip: True when TMR cues are phase-locked to slow oscillation up-state.

widgets.label: Spindle Gated
widgets.tooltip: True when TMR delivery waits for sleep spindle detection.

widgets.label: TMR Cues Delivered
widgets.tooltip: Count of TMR cues delivered this session.

widgets.label: Consolidation Priority
widgets.tooltip: Agent-selected priority ordering for TMR pool items.

widgets.label: HTW Enabled
widgets.tooltip: Enable hypnagogic training windows during natural N1 epochs.

widgets.label: HTW Active
widgets.tooltip: Whether a hypnagogic training window is currently active.

widgets.label: HTW Eligible
widgets.tooltip: True when all HTW eligibility gates are satisfied (>60min N2/N3, >90min since last, count<3).

widgets.label: HTW Count
widgets.tooltip: Number of HTW episodes completed this session (max 3).

widgets.label: HTW TTS Gain
widgets.tooltip: Agent-managed TTS gain during HTW (~6% whisper level).

widgets.label: HTW SSB Gain
widgets.tooltip: Agent-managed subliminal gain during HTW (~14%).

widgets.label: PPG Available
widgets.tooltip: True when PPG data stream is flowing and producing valid peaks.

widgets.label: Heart Rate (BPM)
widgets.tooltip: Instantaneous heart rate from PPG peak detection (16s window).

widgets.label: HRV RMSSD (ms)
widgets.tooltip: Root mean square of successive RR interval differences. Rises with parasympathetic (relaxation) dominance.

widgets.label: Breath Rate (Hz)
widgets.tooltip: Respiratory rate derived from respiratory sinus arrhythmia (RSA) spectral peak.

widgets.label: Breath Phase
widgets.tooltip: Current respiratory phase 0.0-1.0 from RSA-driven monotonic clock.

widgets.label: Motion RMS (g)
widgets.tooltip: RMS deviation of accelerometer from 1g rest. Near-zero = perfectly still.

widgets.label: Head Nod Detected
widgets.tooltip: True when Y-axis pitch shows sustained forward drop – behavioural N1 onset marker.

widgets.label: EEG→Visual Coupling
widgets.tooltip: Route live EEG band powers into visual parameters. Alpha→spiral brightness, Theta→speed, Delta→veil depth, Beta→chaos.

widgets.label: Coupling Gain
widgets.tooltip: Master gain for the EEG→Visual coupling matrix. 0 = no effect, 2 = double sensitivity.

widgets.label: Cue Tone Pool
widgets.tooltip: Currently targeted conditioning pool name.

widgets.label: Association Strength
widgets.tooltip: Current association strength for the active pool's target response.

widgets.label: Pairings This Session
widgets.tooltip: Total conditioning trials delivered this session.

widgets.label: Novelty Score
widgets.tooltip: Current novelty budget utilization. Drops as stimuli habituate.

widgets.label: Novelty Budget
widgets.tooltip: Remaining novelty budget for the current session phase.

widgets.label: Active Stimuli
widgets.tooltip: Short-term habituation level (seconds timescale).

widgets.label: Cooling Stimuli
widgets.tooltip: Medium-term habituation level (minutes timescale).

widgets.label: Trigger Pending
widgets.tooltip: Long-term habituation level (cross-session timescale).

widgets.label: Content Pool
widgets.tooltip: Currently active content pool for TTS/subliminal delivery.

widgets.label: Semantic Density
widgets.tooltip: Content density tier: PRIME (simple, direct), BRIDGE (transitional), DEEPEN (complex, layered).

widgets.label: Syllable Rate (Hz)
widgets.tooltip: Target syllable delivery rate for TTS pacing.

widgets.label: Milton Pattern
widgets.tooltip: Currently active Milton Model language pattern type.

widgets.label: Deliveries
widgets.tooltip: Total content items delivered this session.

widgets.label: Color Temp (K)
widgets.tooltip: Ganzfeld background color temperature. Lower = warmer/redder, aiding melatonin.

widgets.label: Blur Radius (px)
widgets.tooltip: Gaussian blur radius applied to visual field.

widgets.label: Chromatic Aberration
widgets.tooltip: Chromatic aberration offset. Conductor drives from trance_score (0.001 shallow to 0.004 deep).

widgets.label: Vignette Intensity
widgets.tooltip: Edge darkening vignette strength. Draws attention to center.

widgets.label: Bloom Intensity
widgets.tooltip: Bloom/glow post-processing intensity. Conductor drives from trance_score (0.1 shallow to 0.8 deep).

widgets.label: Film Grain
widgets.tooltip: Per-frame luminance noise. Conductor drives from trance_score (0.01 shallow to 0.06 deep).

widgets.label: IAF Luminance Depth
widgets.tooltip: Luminance modulation depth locked to individual alpha frequency.

widgets.label: ASMR Gain
widgets.tooltip: ASMR layer volume.

widgets.label: Spatial Panning
widgets.tooltip: L/R slow spatial panning gain. 0 = off.

widgets.label: Shepard Tones
widgets.tooltip: Shepard tone continuous-pitch illusion gain. 0 = off.

widgets.label: Session Arc
widgets.tooltip: User-selected session shape/trajectory. Determines how intensity and phase progression are managed.

widgets.label: Target Depth
widgets.tooltip: Director's current target trance depth.

widgets.label: Induction Strategy
widgets.tooltip: Selected induction technique. Promoted to Essential when strategy_auto_select is off.

widgets.label: Induction Phase
widgets.tooltip: Current micro-phase within the active induction strategy.

widgets.label: Induction Progress
widgets.tooltip: 0-100% progress through the current induction strategy.

widgets.label: GENUS Enabled
widgets.tooltip: Enable 40 Hz gamma entrainment (GENUS protocol).

widgets.label: GENUS Active
widgets.tooltip: Whether GENUS protocol is currently running.

widgets.label: GENUS Phase
widgets.tooltip: Current GENUS session phase.

widgets.label: GENUS Frequency (Hz)
widgets.tooltip: GENUS entrainment frequency (fixed 40 Hz).

widgets.label: Gamma Verified
widgets.tooltip: True when EEG confirms 40 Hz gamma entrainment is present.

widgets.label: Audio-Only Window
widgets.tooltip: True during the initial audio-only phase before visual 40 Hz is added.

widgets.label: Transition Remaining
widgets.tooltip: Seconds remaining in the current GENUS phase transition.

widgets.label: GENUS Arc
widgets.tooltip: GENUS session shape: standalone, hybrid with trance, or neuroprotection-focused protocol.

widgets.label: GENUS Time
widgets.tooltip: Total GENUS protocol time this session (minutes).

widgets.label: Veil Mode
widgets.tooltip: Particle veil animation style. 'auto' rotates through modes on a timer.

widgets.label: Veil Opacity
widgets.tooltip: Veil particle layer opacity (0—100).

widgets.label: Veil Density
widgets.tooltip: Number of active veil particles (0—100).

widgets.label: Veil Speed
widgets.tooltip: Veil particle speed multiplier.

widgets.label: BG Mode
widgets.tooltip: Background layer mode. 'none' makes the window transparent.

widgets.label: BG Opacity
widgets.tooltip: Background image layer opacity.

widgets.label: Ganzfeld Freq (Hz)
widgets.tooltip: Ganzfeld flicker frequency in Hz.

widgets.label: Ganzfeld Duty
widgets.tooltip: Ganzfeld flicker on/off duty cycle.

widgets.label: Spiral Style
widgets.tooltip: GPU spiral pattern type.

widgets.label: Spiral Geometry
widgets.tooltip: How spiral arms space themselves. Even = uniform gaps. Golden = tighter at center, wider at edges (logarithmic growth).

widgets.label: Spiral Opacity
widgets.tooltip: Spiral layer opacity (0—100).

widgets.label: Spiral Speed
widgets.tooltip: Spiral rotation speed multiplier.

widgets.label: Spiral Chaos
widgets.tooltip: Adds stochastic noise to spiral geometry.

widgets.label: Color Mode
widgets.tooltip: Rainbow: full hue cycle. Solid: uses the base color picker below.

widgets.label: Base Color
widgets.tooltip: Spiral color used when Color Mode is set to Solid.

widgets.label: Arm Count
widgets.tooltip: Number of spiral arms (1–8). Some styles use this differently.

widgets.label: Arm Spacing
widgets.tooltip: Controls how tightly spiral arms wind. Lower = wider spacing, higher = tighter coils.

widgets.label: Arm Thickness
widgets.tooltip: Arm width multiplier. 4=hairline, 24=thick arms.

widgets.label: Loom
widgets.tooltip: Rhythmically zoom the spiral in and out, creating a looming approach/recession effect.

widgets.label: Loom Depth
widgets.tooltip: How much the spiral zooms in and out (0 = subtle, 1 = dramatic Â±25% swing).

widgets.label: Loom Rate
widgets.tooltip: Loom cycle frequency in Hz when sync is set to manual (0.02 = 50s cycle, 0.5 = 2s cycle).

widgets.label: Loom Sync
widgets.tooltip: Sync loom rate to a biological or entrainment frequency instead of the manual rate slider.

widgets.label: Trail Decay
widgets.tooltip: Trail persistence. 0=no trails, 0.85-0.98=active range. Longer trails for deeper states, 0 for fractionation drops.

widgets.label: Entrainment Flicker
widgets.tooltip: Visual entrainment flicker depth. 0=free-running (no flicker), 0.10=fully phase-locked to beat frequency.

widgets.label: Feedback Mode
widgets.tooltip: Spiral persistence/feedback mode. Adds temporal echo effects to the spiral renderer.

widgets.label: Feedback Strength
widgets.tooltip: Intensity of the feedback effect. 0.5=default, 1.0=maximum visual echo.

widgets.label: Font Mode
widgets.tooltip: Affirmation font selection strategy.

widgets.label: Flash Sync to Beat
widgets.tooltip: Sync center flash timing to the binaural beat phase.

widgets.label: Shadow Opacity
widgets.tooltip: Subliminal shadow text opacity (0 = hidden).

widgets.label: Shadow Count
widgets.tooltip: Number of simultaneous shadow text instances.

widgets.label: Text Color
widgets.tooltip: Color of affirmation and veil text.

widgets.label: Always on Top
widgets.tooltip: Keep the display window above all other windows.

widgets.label: Click Through
widgets.tooltip: Make the display window transparent to mouse clicks (WS_EX_TRANSPARENT).

widgets.label: Window Opacity %
widgets.tooltip: Overall display window opacity (DWM alpha).

widgets.label: TTS Enabled
widgets.tooltip: Enable text-to-speech voice affirmation delivery.

widgets.label: Subliminal Mode
widgets.tooltip: Deliver TTS audio above hearing threshold as a subliminal carrier.

widgets.label: TTS Volume
widgets.tooltip: TTS voice output level (0—100).

widgets.label: Subliminal Volume
widgets.tooltip: Volume of the subliminal carrier.

widgets.label: Subliminal Freq (Hz)
widgets.tooltip: Carrier frequency for subliminal encoding.

widgets.label: TTS Backend
widgets.tooltip: TTS synthesis provider. 'edge' uses Edge TTS (free).

widgets.label: Voice
widgets.tooltip: Voice name for the selected backend (e.g. en-US-JennyNeural for Edge TTS, af_bella for local).

widgets.label: API URL
widgets.tooltip: Base URL for OpenAI-compatible or local TTS server.

widgets.label: API Key
widgets.tooltip: API key for the selected TTS provider.

widgets.label: VR Active
widgets.tooltip: True when the VR headset subprocess is rendering frames.

widgets.label: Frame Count
widgets.tooltip: Total frames rendered by the VR headset this session.

widgets.label: Safety Kill
widgets.tooltip: Set when the safety monitor detects a paroxysmal pattern and halts the headset.

widgets.label: SSVEP Index
widgets.tooltip: Binocular rivalry SSVEP detection index (0=no response, 1=strong entrainment).

widgets.label: Switch Rate (Hz)
widgets.tooltip: Measured binocular rivalry switch rate.

widgets.label: Rivalry Depth
widgets.tooltip: Stimulus contrast depth for rivalry / dichoptic modes.

widgets.label: BG Luminance
widgets.tooltip: Background luminance of the VR ganzfeld / photic field.

widgets.label: Vection
widgets.tooltip: Whether the optic flow vection illusion is active.

widgets.label: Render Mode
widgets.tooltip: Current VR render mode: ganzfeld / photic / rivalry / dichoptic_ssvep.

widgets.label: Haptic Connected
widgets.tooltip: Lovense device BLE connection status.

widgets.label: Haptic Intensity
widgets.tooltip: Vibration intensity 0-100. Safety-capped by unlock tier and comfort calibration.

widgets.label: Pattern
widgets.tooltip: Vibration pattern type. Continuous=steady, Pulse=on/off, Wave=sinusoidal, Fractionation=follows Conductor FSM.

widgets.label: Pattern Speed
widgets.tooltip: Pattern cycle speed multiplier.

widgets.label: Actual Intensity
widgets.tooltip: Safety-capped output intensity currently being sent to the device.

widgets.label: Device
widgets.tooltip: Connected Lovense device model name.

widgets.label: Sleep N1/N2 Haptic
widgets.tooltip: Allow haptic TMR cues during N1/N2 sleep. N3/REM always disabled.

widgets.label: taVNS Connected
widgets.tooltip: DG Labs Coyote BLE connection status.

widgets.label: Stimulation Intensity
widgets.tooltip: taVNS stimulation intensity 0-100. Safety-capped by unlock tier, comfort calibration, and impedance.

widgets.label: Waveform
widgets.tooltip: Stimulation waveform shape.

widgets.label: Actual Current (uA)
widgets.tooltip: Safety-capped output current in microamps currently being delivered.

widgets.label: Impedance OK
widgets.tooltip: True when electrode contact impedance is below 5 kOhm threshold.

widgets.label: Impedance (Ohm)
widgets.tooltip: Last measured electrode contact impedance.
